title: troximon ciliatum
intro: Troximon ciliatum is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the woolly meadow salsify or false salsify, characterized by its yellow or purple flowers and downy leaves. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Troximon ciliatum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues and reduce fever, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
